name: value_calculator
description: Looks up the unit cost for an item from the pricing-reference index to calculate the dollar impact of anomalies. Provide the item_key to find its price.
query: FROM pricing-reference | WHERE item_key == ?item_key | KEEP item_key, item_name, unit_cost_usd, unit_label | LIMIT 1

item_key.description: The item identifier to look up in the pricing reference index (e.g., 'insulin_vial', 'electricity_kwh', 'machine_hour').
